rationale: Review 2 has a correct, actionable generality finding: `IsUnipotent` over-inherits `[Field k] [CommRing A]` when only `[CommSemiring k] [Ring A]` is needed for `GroupLike` and `IsNilpotent`. Review 1's sole generality finding — dropping `[Field k]` to `[CommRing k]` on `AffineAlgGroup` — appears incorrect because `Algebra.IsGeometricallyReduced` is a field-level concept in Mathlib, so acting on it would likely cause type errors rather than improve generality.
